_description: Monthly snapshot of the three Scale Cross-Step KPIs (Rule of 40, NDR, Leadership-Health-Score / Wickman Organizational Checkup™). Persisted into path_state.cross_kpis on append. Values carry over on step-advance (3.1 → 3.2 → 3.3 → 3.4). The Scale-Complete gate in 3.4 requires sustained-green status across these three for ≥ 4 quarters.

note: Example row — delete on first real Cross-KPI snapshot.
